description_long: This is a large, modern SUV with a robust and boxy design, featuring a prominent front grille guard and a sunroof on the roof. The vehicle has four passenger doors and a rear hatch, with tinted windows and chrome side steps for easier entry. The wheels are alloy with a five-spoke design, and the body is finished in a two-tone color scheme with darker lower panels. The rear of the SUV displays a subtle badge and a visible license plate area, while the front is equipped with a sturdy bumper and protective grille. The overall build suggests a spacious interior, likely with multiple seating rows and ample cargo space. The materials appear to be primarily metal and glass, with some plastic trim and rubber tires.
description: A large, boxy SUV with a grille guard, sunroof, chrome side steps, and five-spoke alloy wheels, finished in a two-tone color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the grille guard, front bumper, and sunroof.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, chrome side step, and alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rear hatch, tinted windows, and license plate area.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing doors, side step, and wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke alloy wheels with a simple, clean pattern
